theme: Unfolding a gemstone into the smallest sticker
title: Gemstone Sticker: Fold-Compaction Under Overlap Avoidance
strategies: textbook spanning tree: scan the given fusion edges in input order and keep an edge whenever it does not close a cycle (Kruskal-order forest, oblivious to where facets actually land)
cut-everything baseline: discard every fusion edge and ship each facet as its own 1x1 sticker (always feasible, always maximal piece-count penalty)

flat/fold decomposition + per-boundary local search: union all opposite-tab (flat) fusion edges first to recover rigid panels, then for each fold junction simulate every redundant hinge candidate, reject any that overlaps already-placed facets, and keep the one minimizing incremental bounding-box growth, falling back to a fresh piece when every candidate collides
global backtracking / simulated annealing over the full space of spanning forests, jointly optimizing all hinge choices and piece boundaries at once (left as headroom above the strong reference)
